message:
fix(tcp,copy,broadcast,region): correctness fixes across networking and IO

TCP stream — handle NotConnected errors during IO registration:
- Add ErrorKind::NotConnected match arms in poll_read_priv and
  wait_for_connect to fall back to pending-wake path instead of
  propagating an error. On some platforms/timing conditions, the
  socket may report NotConnected when the epoll/kqueue registration
  races with connection establishment. The fallback wake path retries
  registration on the next poll, matching existing EWOULDBLOCK handling.
- Add RegisterNotConnectedReactor test fixture and regression test
  that verifies NotConnected during register produces Poll::Pending
  (not an error) and clears stale registration state.

IO copy — fix flush-then-pending control flow:
- In Copy, CopyBuf, and CopyWithProgress: when the reader returns
  Pending and need_flush is set, always return Pending after attempting
  the flush regardless of whether the flush itself completes. The
  previous code returned Pending inside the flush-completed branch,
  which was correct but the else-branch for no-flush-needed was
  unreachable dead code after the if-block. Flatten the control flow
  so the single return Pending is unconditional after the flush
  attempt, making the logic clearer and removing 6 lines of dead code.

Broadcast channel — fix test race in last-receiver-drops-clears-buffer:
- Move the rx drop into a separate thread and spin-wait for the
  receiver count to reach 0 before releasing the lock guard, ensuring
  deterministic ordering between the drop path (which tries to acquire
  inner lock) and the sender thread (which holds the lock).

Distributed region — fail on unknown replica_lost:
- Change replica_lost() to return an error when the replica ID is not
  found instead of silently continuing. Previously, calling
  replica_lost("nonexistent") would skip the status update but still
  evaluate quorum and potentially degrade the region based on stale
  state. Now returns ErrorKind::Internal with a clear message.
- Add regression test verifying unknown replica_lost errors without
  mutating region state.

Doctor — add clippy::too_many_lines allow on operator_model_contract()
function to suppress lint on the large contract builder.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
